changelog: Polish 12.2.3: Reservation 2-hour reminder worker. New scripts/reservation-reminder-worker.php picks up active reservations starting in NOW()+110m..130m (20-min window so missed cron ticks still catch the row), sends one Telegram message per row to the tenant chat, then stamps reservations.reminder_sent_at via Database::markReservationReminderSent() so the row is never reminded twice. Migration sql/reservation-reminder-migration.sql adds reminder_sent_at DATETIME NULL via INFORMATION_SCHEMA-guarded ALTER. Cron */5 * * * *.
